header.custName: Trend Micro_趨勢科技股份有限公司

jobDetail.jobDescription:
Job Description
Overview

We Endpoint Module team is responsible for building Trend Micro’s most fundamental and critical engines, the core of our security technologies. These engines power key protection capabilities across our entire endpoint product line.

To stay ahead of today’s evolving threats and meet the ever-changing needs of our customers, we continuously refine and advance our technologies. Here, we don’t just maintain—we innovate.



Join us, and you’ll work hands-on with the most essential components in Trend Micro’s protection stack, gaining deep insights into how we safeguard our customers’ products in real-world environments.



We are now looking for passionate and experienced software engineers to join our team. You will help develop and maintain our core detection and protection engines on endpoint platforms (Windows/Linux), playing a critical role in Trend Micro’s overall security portfolio.



Below are some examples which you might be involved:

● Develop features on the Linux/Windows platform, with a focus on C/C++.
● Develop automation processes/systems for the testing flow, with a focus on Python.
● Develop and maintain both user-mode dlls and kernel mode drivers.
● Apply DevOps practices to enhance engine availability and reliability.
● Collaborate with different teams to resolve customer issues.

● Leverage AI-assisted development tools to accelerate coding and improve code quality.



What you can learn in this job?

● Solid technology in Linux/Windows system domain
● C/C++/Python coding skill
● Automation testing skill
● Dump analyzing skill
● Performance analyzing skill



Qualification/Requirement

● Highly proactive, self-motivated and good team work
● Familiar with/interested in Linux/Windows system mechanism
● 3+ years of C/C++ developing experience



Nice-to-have as a plus

● BS or MS in Computer Science or related field.
● Strong knowledge of Linux/Windows internal
● Good English communication skills.
● Familiar with python
● Deep threat knowledge is a plus.
● Experience with AI-assisted development tools (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot).
